ciphers.text: apron + worn shirt — a uniform but not a costume; reads as worker not actor
ciphers.encoding_hint: John's framing is occupational — counter wiper at D'Ambrosio's, not foregrounded as protagonist. The Fool's first state: doing the job.

ciphers.text: dog visible in the cropped portrait (continues from fool.png)
ciphers.encoding_hint: the Fool's traditional companion stays with John even in the close crop. Name TBD in vol5_ch0 prose.

ciphers.text: city skyline + steamboat skyline visible behind him
ciphers.encoding_hint: the same skyline appears as backdrop on Magician's miniature city — John works at D'Ambrosio's, the riverboat ON that skyline. Spatial linkage between Fool / Magician / Emperor.

ciphers.text: during glitch frames, John's face tints toward Frasier's color zone (cyan-teal) and back to jaundiced
ciphers.encoding_hint: color-channel bleed between John (vol5_ch0 POV) and Frasier (vol5_ch1 POV) — when the Fool glitches, the Magician shows through. They are mirror chapters.
